title: .autopilot/frontend-quality.json
description: Per-project configuration for the Layer 2 deterministic frontend audit (scripts/audit-frontend.ts). All fields are optional; absent fields fall back to defaults. additionalProperties is false at every level to catch config typos that would silently disable rules.

componentLibrary.description: Informational metadata for future Layer 1 playbook customization. Not consumed by the v1 audit script.

themeFiles.description: Informational; reserved for future stack-detection / playbook use. Not used by the v1 audit. For raw-color allowlisting, use rawColorAllowedFiles.

rawColorAllowedFiles.description: Glob patterns (minimatch) for files where forbidRawColorLiterals is intentionally skipped. All other rules still apply to these files.

rules.description: Per-rule toggle map. All rules default to true except forbidMagicSpacing (false).

ignorePaths.description: Glob patterns (minimatch). Files matching any pattern are excluded BEFORE extension filtering, so test/story files can be skipped wholesale.

buttonComponents.description: Component names treated as button-like by requireAriaLabelOnIconButton. Defaults: button, Button, IconButton, DropdownMenuTrigger, TooltipTrigger, PopoverTrigger, SheetTrigger, AlertDialogTrigger, DialogTrigger.

selfLabelingInputComponents.description: Component names exempted from requireLabelForInput (assumed to self-label). Defaults: FormControl, TextField, RadioGroup.

repoRelativePath.description: Repo-root-relative path. No leading slash, no '..' segments.

repoRelativeGlob.description: Repo-root-relative glob (minimatch). No leading slash, no '..' segments.
